title: Dekton 2-Piece Snap-Off Utility Knife Set with 5pc 9mm and 18mm Blades, Retractable Safety Mechanism, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handles, Heavy-Duty Construction for Cutting Cardboard, Leather,Carpet and More
features: Dual Knife Set with Versatile Blade Sizes This set includes two utility knives, each designed to accommodate different blade sizes—9mm and 18mm—providing flexibility for various cutting tasks, from intricate crafts to heavy-duty materials

Retractable Blade Mechanism for Enhanced Safety Each knife features a retractable blade system, allowing users to adjust blade length as needed and safely retract the blade when not in use, minimizing the risk of accidental cuts.

Snap-Off Blades for Continuous Sharpness The snap-off blade design ensures a fresh, sharp edge is always available. Simply snap off the dull segment to reveal a new cutting edge, maintaining efficiency and precision.
Ergonomic Non-Slip Handles for Comfort Designed with user comfort in mind, the knives feature ergonomic, non-slip handles that provide a secure grip, reducing hand fatigue during prolonged use.

Heavy-Duty Construction for Durability Built with robust materials, these utility knives are designed to withstand heavy use, making them suitable for cutting through tough materials like carpet, leather, and thick cardboard.
description: The Dekton 2-Piece Snap-Off Utility Knife Set is designed for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals seeking precision, safety, and durability in cutting tasks. Each knife features a retractable blade mechanism, allowing for adjustable blade length and safe storage when not in use. The snap-off design ensures a consistently sharp edge, reducing downtime and enhancing efficiency. Constructed with heavy-duty materials, these knives are built to withstand rigorous use. The ergonomic, non-slip handles provide a comfortable grip, minimizing hand fatigue during extended use. This set includes five 9mm blades and five 18mm blades, catering to various cutting needs. Whether you're cutting cardboard, leather, carpet, or other materials, this versatile set delivers reliable performance. Ideal for home improvement projects, crafting, and professional applications, the Dekton Snap-Off Utility Knife Set is a valuable addition to any toolkit.
